chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.S-1011 of 2025 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 09.02.2026 None present for the petitioner. ------------------------- Today nobody is present on behalf of the petitioner to assist this Court. This court is left with no option but to dismiss this petition, in default. Order accordingly. JUDGE Shafi
